description:
You know I'm a yoga teacher and a health coach but you might not know why... 

The journey began over 30 years ago and as is often the case in life, my struggles have been my greatest teachers......🌅 

For me, yoga, nutrition and essential oils helped me heal from the pain and fatigue that came with Lyme and Hashimoto's thyroiditis......❤️ 

Finding that balance between Willpower and Chillpower is why I founded Flexible Warrior yoga, health & wellness.....☯️ 

Everyone is a a warrior at some level. Whether you're an athlete, a stay-at-home mom or a corporate executive, we all want to look, feel and be our best 😍...... 

It's about finding the balance between"never give up" and "always let go" ☯️...... 

www.flexiblewarrior.com


#myhealthcoachstory  #namaste #healthcoach #flexiblewarrior #willpower #chillpower #balance #recovery #resilience #holistichealth #selfcare #nourishyourbody #flexibility #sundayshare #yogateacher #workharder #worryless #eathealthy #dancemore #behappy #nevergiveup #alwaysletgo #thinkpositive #selflove #lymedisease #hashimotos #autoimmunewarrior
